releases.author: waymakerlabs
releases.description:
Prepare release for Obsidian Community review.

- Fix Obsidian community automated review findings.
- Use Supabase Storage client directly to avoid background auth/realtime code in the bundle.
- Add release asset provenance attestation workflow.
- Add network and data disclosure to README.

releases.author: waymakerlabs
releases.description:
## What's New

### 🎨 Settings UI Improvements
- **Section Headers**: Organized settings into clear sections (Connection, Usage, Setup Guide)
- **Connection Status Badge**: Visual indicator showing connection state
- **API Key Toggle**: Show/hide button for the API key field
- **Modern Styling**: Clean, shadcn-inspired design with `styles.css`

### 📝 Documentation
- Added note about Supabase Cloud and self-hosted support

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/waymakerlabs/obsidian-supabase-uploader/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: waymakerlabs
releases.description:
## Initial Release

Obsidian plugin to automatically upload images to Supabase Storage.

### Features
- 📋 **Paste Upload**: Paste images from clipboard (Ctrl/Cmd+V)
- 🖱️ **Drag & Drop**: Drag image files into the editor
- 🔗 **Auto Markdown**: Automatic `![](url)` conversion
- 🗑️ **Delete from Context Menu**: Right-click to delete from Supabase
- 📁 **Date-based Organization**: `YYYY/MM/DD/uuid.ext` folder structure

### Supported Formats
- PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP (max 10MB)

### Installation
Download `main.js` and `manifest.json` and place them in:
`{your-vault}/.obsidian/plugins/supabase-image-uploader/`

See [README](https://github.com/waymakerlabs/obsidian-supabase-uploader#readme) for Supabase setup instructions.
releases.name: v1.0.0
